nodes.context: A set of the Crips alliance, involved in drug trafficking, weapon trafficking, murder, and robbery. Active in Los Angeles, New York City, and Belize City.
A large alliance of street gangs based in Los Angeles, California, involved in various criminal activities.
A rival alliance of street gangs to the Crips, based in Los Angeles and other cities.

edges.context: The Rollin' 30s Harlem Crips are a set of the larger Crips alliance.
The gang assaulted a girl wearing red, the color of the rival Bloods gang.
